description: Create a three-column content slide titled Europe, Middle East, India and Africa listing tax alert bullet items by country and date.

header.headline: Europe, Middle East, India and Africa

items.text: Belgium — Latest edition of EY Belgium’s customs and excise update Q4 November 2025
Ghana — Ghana Court of Appeal decides on procedures for claiming VAT and corporate tax refunds
Ghana — Ghana’s Parliament enacts several indirect tax-related laws, effective 1 January 2026
Gibraltar — Gibraltar announces details of Transaction Tax on goods and changes to duty
India — Reserve Bank of India (RBI) issues the Foreign Exchange Management (Export and Import of Goods and Services) Regulations, 2026 (EXIM Guidelines)
India — Reciprocal tariffs announced by US government in April 2025, struck down by US Supreme Court
India — RBI issues Export and Import Regulations, 2026
Italy — Italy makes indirect tax changes through 2026 Italian Budget Law and publishes consolidated VAT code
Italy — Italy VAT audit focus on year-end transfer pricing adjustments
Liechtenstein — USTR issues notice implementing new trade framework between the United States, Switzerland and Liechtenstein
Netherlands — Netherlands announces change to non-EU VAT refund scheme as of 1 April 2026
Netherlands — Dutch Parliament receives government-solicited, EY-prepared report on VAT in the Digital Age (ViDA) e-invoicing and digital reporting
